description.value: You've perfected the skill of moving around on four limbs while holding on to objects or weapons in your middle hands. While in quadrupedal posture, you can still hold one object or weapon of light Bulk in each of your middle limbs. You can't designate these hands as your active hands until you've returned to bipedal posture with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Change Posture].

value.value: You don't have the Consistently Quadrupedal feat.
